message: Historical failure on the shared English fixture: WhisperX's repo-native transcribe path returned an empty segments list, but the issue was resolved by switching to a model-appropriate Aishell fixture.

root_cause: Default pyannote VAD logged 'No active speech found in audio' on the shared English fixture
Targeted retry with vad_method='silero' produced the same empty-segments outcome on that fixture
User-provided Aishell fixture passed the same default repo-native WhisperX entrypoint, so the failure was fixture-specific rather than a blocker to onboarding

mitigation_options: Use a model-appropriate fixture for phase-1 validation
Keep the shared English fixture only as a documented residual risk
